rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (De Pijp, Jordaan); central avg ~$2000 but non-central furnished lets ~$1500-1700

groceries.note: home cooking; Albert Heijn / Lidl; €300-400/mo reported

diningOut.note: mix of cafes, weekday lunches, occasional dinner; lunch €10-15, dinner €20-35

transit.note: OV-chipkaart monthly pass ~€90; city is very bikeable

misc.note: gym (~€35), toiletries, entertainment, museum card, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Amsterdam medium-term furnished lets are fairly stable year-round.

evidence.claim: Amsterdam solo monthly cost with rent
evidence.quote: a single person in Amsterdam should plan on about $3,516 per month with rent, or $1,254 without housing
short-term rentals in central locations range from €2,500-4,000 per month for a one-bedroom, while shared accommodations can bring this down to €1,000-1,500 per month
Cooking at home costs around €300-400 per month for groceries
desk rentals run around 150 euros per month and up with a wide range of packages and services
